person.name: Alex Tran
person.headline: Backend Engineer and Product-Minded Full-Stack Builder
person.summary: Alex Tran is a Ho Chi Minh City based software engineer with 5+ years of experience building internal platforms, SaaS products, and customer-facing web applications. His strongest area is backend development with Node.js and TypeScript, with hands-on experience in API design, PostgreSQL, system integration, and shipping pragmatic product features end to end.
person.current_status: Open to backend engineer and full-stack product engineer opportunities.
person.career_objective: Grow into a senior engineer who can own product-facing backend systems, system design decisions, and AI-enabled application workflows.

working_style.collaboration_style: Alex prefers clear ownership, short feedback loops, and direct communication. He is comfortable working with product managers, designers, and other engineers, and he tends to document important decisions when a project starts growing in complexity.
working_style.communication_style: Concise, practical, and transparent about tradeoffs or missing information.
working_style.decision_making_style: Start with the simplest solution that is maintainable, then add complexity only when there is a real product or operational need.
engineering_values: No fabricated claims in AI features
